summary: Iteration 2 retest after main agent applied 3 fixes (Sidebar flex flex-col, include_router moved to end, /dashboard/stats allows outlet_admin/order_manager/factory_manager). All three primary fixes are CONFIRMED WORKING in the UI. Login matrix, wrong-password, sidebar collapse, activity-logs page, and logout-button viewport visibility for both super_admin and outlet_admin all PASS. ONE NEW residual issue found: /api/dashboard/branch-summary still returns 403 for outlet_admin (separate endpoint from /dashboard/stats which now works), so the dashboard partially loads with a 403 console error for the branch-summary widget.

minor.issue: Still returns 403 for outlet_admin while /api/dashboard/stats now returns 200. The fix added outlet_admin/order_manager/factory_manager to /stats but not to /branch-summary. UI: dashboard page renders and stats numbers load, but branch-summary section throws AxiosError 403 in console (no visible toast).

integration_issues.issue: /api/dashboard/branch-summary returns 403; dashboard otherwise loads fine. /api/dashboard/stats now correctly returns 200.

test_coverage_results.TEST_1_super_admin_logout_visible: PASS - logout button bounding box {x:16, y:1030, width:223, height:34}, bottom=1064 < viewport 1080. Long 24-item menu now scrolls inside ScrollArea. Fix `flex flex-col` confirmed in /app/frontend/src/components/Sidebar.js line 90.
test_coverage_results.TEST_2_outlet_admin_logout_visible: PASS - logout button at y=1030, bottom=1064 (inside viewport).
test_coverage_results.TEST_4_activity_logs_200: PASS - /api/activity-logs returns 200 (was 404 in iteration 1). Page loads with empty state 'No logs found' rendering cleanly. include_router fix confirmed.
test_coverage_results.TEST_5_outlet_admin_dashboard: PARTIAL PASS - /api/dashboard/stats returns 200 (FIX CONFIRMED), but /api/dashboard/branch-summary still returns 403 for outlet_admin. No 403 toast/alert visible in UI; only console errors. Dashboard page itself renders.
test_coverage_results.TEST_6_login_matrix: PASS - super_admin→/dashboard, outlet_admin→/dashboard, order_manager (manager@usbakers.com)→/dashboard, kitchen→/kitchen, delivery→/delivery, factory_manager→/factory.
test_coverage_results.TEST_7_wrong_password: PASS - 'Invalid email or password' shown, stays on /login.

action_items: FIX (MED): Add OUTLET_ADMIN/ORDER_MANAGER/FACTORY_MANAGER to RBAC allowlist for /api/dashboard/branch-summary endpoint (same fix already applied to /api/dashboard/stats). Without this, outlet_admin sees 403 in console for branch-summary widget on dashboard.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard endpoints /stats and /branch-summary should share a common RBAC dependency rather than each duplicating role lists — current state shows asymmetry where one was fixed but the other wasn't.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on iteration-2-scoped fixes (3/3 fixes verified). 1 unrelated residual /branch-summary 403 carried over.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All three iteration-2 scope fixes (Sidebar flex flex-col, /api/activity-logs registration, /api/dashboard/stats RBAC) are confirmed PASS via real Playwright UI tests at 1920x1080. Logout button is now visible inside the viewport for super_admin (24-item menu) and outlet_admin. Activity logs page renders with empty state and 200 response. /dashboard/stats now returns 200 for outlet_admin. Only residual issue is /api/dashboard/branch-summary still 403 for outlet_admin — recommend applying same RBAC fix to that endpoint as a quick follow-up. No retest of TV kitchen / sidebar-collapse-reflow / wrong-password / activity-logs Radix needed (per main agent instruction).
rca_of_the_issue: The /branch-summary endpoint was not updated alongside /stats during iteration_2 fix. Reproduction: login as outlet@usbakers.com / outlet123 → /dashboard → DevTools Network shows GET /api/dashboard/branch-summary → 403. Console: 'Failed to fetch dashboard data: AxiosError'. Mitigation: in /app/backend/server.py, locate the /api/dashboard/branch-summary route and add OUTLET_ADMIN, ORDER_MANAGER, FACTORY_MANAGER to its allowed-roles set (mirror the /stats fix).
